content:
# Chelating Agents

**Summary**: Chemical compounds that form stable complexes with metal ions.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] evaluated chelating agents to mitigate the effects of high hardness on fracturing fluids.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] Used to sequester metal ions that interfere with polymer crosslinking.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] Chemical analysis of fluid performance.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Chelating agents can prevent premature crosslinking and allow for better hydration in produced water systems. ([[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021, p. 34]])
